# Extaticaa

> Ecstatic dance events in the jungles of Da Nang and Hoi An, Vietnam.

Extaticaa organizes outdoor ecstatic dance events, cacao ceremonies, and conscious movement gatherings in Central Vietnam. Events take place in jungle clearings, beaches, and natural settings.

## What is Ecstatic Dance

Ecstatic dance is free-form movement with no choreography, no talking on the dance floor, and no phones. Music journeys go from slow grounding rhythms to wild tribal peaks and back to stillness. It is a sober, phone-free practice.

## Events

All events are listed at: https://extaticaa.com/en/events

Current event: The Jungle Tribe: Ecstatic Dance & Cacao Ritual
- Date: April 25, 2026
- Time: 16:30 - 21:30
- Location: Da Nang, Vietnam
- Includes: Cacao ceremony, Dance Movement Therapy, DJ sets, live tribal drumming, fire performance
- Tickets: https://www.ticketmelon.com/extaticaa/JUNGLE

## Location

Da Nang and Hoi An, Central Vietnam.

## Languages

Website available in English and Vietnamese.
